text_block_list.text:
Break is almost over, and I'm heading back to the
office early to prepare for training, when...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph. That's because I was able to take a good
rest.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Give me some training with some bite to it.
Something strong enough to cool my boiling
blood.

Properly rested, Narita Brian is full of vim and
vigor.
